title: Union Bank of India UBI Specialist Officer Online Form 2026 + Government Job + India + Apply Now
excerpt: Union Bank of India is inviting online applications for the recruitment of Specialist Officers. Interested candidates can apply from 21 July 2026 to 10 August 2026. The recruitment is for 395 posts.
value_prop: _Apply for the Union Bank of India UBI Specialist Officer Online Form 2026 and get a chance to work with a leading government bank in India_
secondary_subtitle: _Check the eligibility criteria, application process, and important dates for the Union Bank of India UBI Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026_

About Organization

The Union Bank of India is a leading government bank in India. It was established in 1917 and has its headquarters in Mumbai.

The bank has a wide range of products and services, including personal banking, corporate banking, and investment banking.

About the Programme

The Union Bank of India UBI Specialist Officer programme is a recruitment programme for specialist officers in the bank.

The programme aims to recruit talented and skilled individuals to work in various roles in the bank.
